PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Petitioner.

Ms. Ng stated that there are no documents concerning the businesses or succession in interests. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
